title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 229.390 - Notice to be in writing — service
text:
229.390.  Notice to be in writing — service. — Such notice shall be given in writing, by leaving a copy of the same with some station agent of said company five days before the said presentation to said county commission, or if there be no such station agent in such county, then by mailing a copy of such notice to their general office fifteen days before said day.
(RSMo 1939 § 8737) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 8089; 1919 § 10860; 1909 § 10628
